idea-plugin.name: Mindmap - Kotlin CallGraph
idea-plugin.description:
Mindmap — Kotlin Call Graph Visualizer

Visualize Kotlin function call graphs as interactive mind maps inside your IDE. Place your cursor on any function, press Alt+G, and instantly see the full call chain — who calls it, what it calls, and how deep it goes.

🎯 Key Features

  • Interactive Graph View — hierarchical left-to-right layout with drag, zoom, and pan
  • Tree View — collapsible tree with SVG icons and continuous connector lines
  • Bidirectional Analysis — outbound calls (children) + inbound callers (parents)
  • Click-to-Navigate — single click jumps to source code
  • Double-Click Trace — merge a node's call graph into the current view without losing position
  • Cmd+Click Expand — re-center the graph on any node
  • Box Selection — drag on empty canvas to select and move multiple nodes together
  • Navigation History — back/forward through explored functions (Alt+← / Alt+→)
  • Search & Filter — filter nodes by name across both views
  • Library Code Toggle — show or hide library/SDK function calls
  • Smart Labels — duplicate function names automatically show their file name
  • Hover Info Cards — rich tooltips with signature, file, depth, and LOC
  • Zoom Controls — scroll wheel, +/- keys, fit-all, center-on-node
  • Catppuccin Mocha Theme — premium dark UI with polished aesthetics

⚡ Quick Start

  1. Place cursor inside any Kotlin function
  2. Press Alt+G (or right-click → Generate Mindmap)
  3. Explore the interactive call graph in the Mindmap tool window

🖱️ Controls

  • Left-drag on empty space → box select multiple nodes
  • Right-drag / Middle-drag → pan the view
  • Scroll → zoom in/out
  • Drag node → move freely in any direction

Supports K1 and K2 Kotlin compiler modes. Works with IntelliJ IDEA 2024.3+ and Android Studio Ladybug+.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
1.0.0

  • Initial release
  • Interactive graph view with hierarchical layout
  • Tree view with SVG icons and continuous connectors
  • Box/marquee selection for multi-node movement
  • Right-click / middle-click drag for panning
  • Navigation history (back/forward)
  • Double-click trace with position preservation
  • Smart duplicate name detection with filename
  • Bidirectional analysis (outbound + inbound calls)
  • Large file optimization (300 node cap, batch limits)
  • Crash-proof error handling across all entry points
  • JCEF fallback panel for Android Studio
  • Catppuccin Mocha dark theme

action.description: Generate a call graph mindmap for the selected function
